category_sources: source_facts.description says vcluster creates fully functional virtual Kubernetes clusters inside a host Kubernetes cluster namespace.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name provides the project name vcluster.
docs_sources: Official vCluster website provides dedicated documentation at https://www.vcluster.com/docs.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies virtual Kubernetes cluster functionality; source_facts.executables lists the vcluster CLI.
